description_long: This object is an irregularly shaped stone composed of a dense matrix of rounded pebbles and gravel embedded in a grayish cement-like matrix, resembling a piece of urban conglomerate or concrete. The surface is uneven, with protruding stones of various sizes and colors, including off-white, tan, gray, and occasional reddish hues. The stone has a rugged, natural appearance, with no visible signs of artificial shaping or cutting, and its texture is coarse and granular. Some areas show more densely packed pebbles, while others have smoother, more eroded patches. The coloration is mottled, with the embedded stones creating a visually complex, speckled pattern. This type of stone is commonly found in urban environments as a remnant of construction or as a natural obstacle in parks and roadside areas.
description: A rugged, irregular stone with a coarse, pebbly surface and a mottled mix of gray, tan, and reddish hues. The stone is dense and natural-looking, with embedded rounded pebbles throughout.
description_view_0: The stone appears relatively flat and wide, with a prominent display of embedded pebbles and a mottled surface pattern.
description_view_1: This view highlights the stone's height and the clustering of larger pebbles on the upper surface, with more visible color variation.
description_view_2: The elongated side of the stone is visible, showing a mix of smooth and rough patches and a dense concentration of embedded stones.
description_view_3: The end of the stone is shown, revealing a blockier profile and a cross-section of the pebbly matrix.
attribute_location: urban park, roadside verge, or construction debris pile
attribute_placement: set as a standalone feature or partially embedded in soil or gravel
attribute_pattern: Irregular, mottled pattern created by embedded rounded pebbles of varying sizes and colors, with no artificial carvings or regularity.
attribute_weathering: Surface is rough and slightly eroded, with some smoother patches indicating moderate exposure to weather and abrasion.
attribute_integration_with_surroundings: Blends naturally with gravel, soil, or other stones, but can contrast with paved or manicured urban surfaces; may be partially surrounded by vegetation or debris.
